headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 8, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees continued their winning streak with a 9-2 victory over the Texas Rangers, while the Washington Nationals took down the Minnesota Twins 7-5. The Cleveland Guardians also secured a win, defeating the Kansas City Royals 8-5. The Chicago Cubs dominated the Cincinnati Reds 8-3, and the Baltimore Orioles made a trade to acquire right-handed pitcher Enyel Garcia.

Injuries and availability have impacted several teams, with the Pittsburgh Pirates placing left fielder Jake Mangum on the 10-day injured list due to a left hamstring strain. The Baltimore Orioles also placed left-handed pitcher Cade Povich on the 15-day injured list with left elbow inflammation. Other teams have made similar moves, including the Los Angeles Angels, Kansas City Royals, New York Yankees, San Diego Padres, and Boston Red Sox.

The Baltimore Orioles made a trade with the Philadelphia Phillies, acquiring right-handed pitcher Enyel Garcia and right-handed pitcher Maicol Lauriano in exchange for cash. The Chicago Cubs also made a trade, acquiring right-handed pitcher Tyler Ferguson from the Athletics.

top_news.title: **Yankees Cruise Past Rangers 9-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Texas Rangers, securing a 9-2 victory. Ezequiel Duran led the Rangers' offense with a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Twins 7-5**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a 7-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Keibert Ruiz leading the offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. Taylor Rogers pitched 1.2 scoreless innings for the Twins, striking out 2 batters.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Royals 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-5 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Bo Naylor leading the charge at the plate. Naylor hit 2 home runs, drove in 3 runs, and went 5 for 5 at the plate.

top_news.title: **Cubs Cruise Past Reds 8-3**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing an 8-3 victory behind a strong performance from their pitching staff. Michael Conforto led the Reds' offense with a 3-hit game, including a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Pirates Place Jake Mangum on 10-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Pittsburgh Pirates left fielder Jake Mangum has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left hamstring strain. The move is retroactive to May 6, 2026.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Enyel Garcia in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired right-handed pitcher Enyel Garcia in a trade with the Philadelphia Phillies. The deal also includes right-handed pitcher Maicol Lauriano, with the Orioles receiving cash in return.
